---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/component-analysis.ipynb"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  image-placeholder: "assets/research-placeholder-pencil.png"
page-layout: full
---

Research on data structure, dimensionality reduction, and informative visualization.
